def suitable_for_management(self) -> bool:
        if (self.age in range(30, 60) and 
            self.employment_status == EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED and 
            (self.education == Education.MASTER or self.education == Education.DOCTOR) and 
            (self.leadership_skills == LeadershipSkills.HIGH or self.leadership_skills == LeadershipSkills.VERY_HIGH)):
            return True
        else:
            return False
